name: e2e-v2-continuation-invalid
description: Block when a continuation stage emits an invalid generated nextFlowSpec.

stages.prompt: Reply exactly E2E_V2_CONTINUATION_INVALID_SOURCE and do not inspect or modify files.
Reply exactly {"summary":"E2E_V2_CONTINUATION_INVALID","nextFlowSpec":{"schemaVersion":2,"agent":"scout","flow":{"stages":[]}}} and do not inspect or modify files.
